ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trade_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade configuration */,
  "instance" TEXT /* Name of the trade configuration instance */,
  "entity_level" TEXT /* Entity level of the trade configuration (e.g., sym+traderID) */,
  "sample_time_period_days" INTEGER /* Sample time period in days */,
  "close_time_interval" TEXT /* Close time interval */,
  "min_price_count" INTEGER /* Minimum price count */,
  "min_acceptable_sample_days" INTEGER /* Minimum acceptable sample days */,
  "end_of_month_weight" REAL /* End of month weight */,
  "end_of_month_time_interval" INTEGER /* End of month time interval */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* The user who created the trade configuration */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date the trade configuration was created */,
  "modified_by" TEXT /* The user who last modified the trade configuration */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* The date the trade configuration was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the trade configuration (e.g., active, inactive, archived) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the trade configuration */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* The type of trade (e.g., buy, sell, option) */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* The type of instrument (e.g., stock, bond, futures) */,
  "market" TEXT /* The market where the trade will be executed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_configuration_filters" (
  "filter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filter */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* The trade configuration ID associated with the filter */,
  "filter_name" TEXT /* The name of the filter (e.g., sourceData, sym) */,
  "filter_value" TEXT /* The value of the filter (e.g., BBG_TRADEBOOK, XYZ-Jun2015) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("filter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_configuration_filters_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES trade_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_configuration_thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threshold */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* The trade configuration ID associated with the threshold */,
  "threshold_name" TEXT /* The name of the threshold (e.g., close trade quantity percentage) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* The value of the threshold (e.g., 20.0) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_configuration_thresholds_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES trade_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* The username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* The password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* The role of the user (e.g., admin, trader, risk manager) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_configuration_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change event */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* The trade configuration ID associated with the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* The date the change was made */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* The user who made the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the change made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_configuration_history_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES trade_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade activity */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* The trade configuration ID associated with the activity */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* The date the trade was executed */,
  "trade_time" TEXT /* The time the trade was executed */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* The type of trade (e.g., buy, sell, option) */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* The type of instrument (e.g., stock, bond, futures) */,
  "market" TEXT /* The market where the trade was executed */,
  "trade_quantity" INTEGER /* The quantity of the trade */,
  "trade_price" REAL /* The price of the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_activity_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES trade_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* The trade configuration ID associated with the analytics */,
  "analytics_date" TEXT /* The date the analytics were generated */,
  "trade_volume" INTEGER /* The total trade volume */,
  "trade_value" REAL /* The total trade value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_analytics_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES trade_configurations ("config_id")
)
